etymology.description: phonetic: 文(wén, "literature") + semantic: 彡(shān, "decorative lines, ornament") = variegated; literary talent -> variegated decoration or literary talent
etymology.interpretation: The character 彣(wén, "variegated; literary talent") combines 文(wén, "literature") as the phonetic component with 彡(shān, "decorative lines, ornament") as the semantic component to convey the idea of variegation or literary talent, suggesting ornamental qualities in writing or patterning.
